Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Represents an audit/monitoring visit report of a healthcare facility.

facilityName.description: Name of the audited healthcare facility

rating.description: Performance classification tag, e.g. Satisfactory, Unsatisfactory

status.description: Audit report completion status, e.g. Completed, Draft or In Progress

inspector.description: Monitoring and evaluation lead auditor name

recommendations.description: Executive recommendations and summary of findings

scores.description: Key-value mapping of checklist item ID to numeric scorecard values (-1 to 5)

checklistObservations.description: Key-value mapping of checklist item ID to detailed text observations

checklistPhotos.description: Key-value mapping of checklist item ID to captured base64 evidence image data URLs

photos.description: Array of general captured witness photo base64 strings

visits/{visitId}.description: Healthcare facility monitoring and audit compliance reports
